creator: jhibbits@FreeBSD.org
text:
Building net/samba47 on HEAD with gcc yields the following error:

../source3/modules/vfs_freebsd.c:67: error: 'FILE' redeclared as different kind of symbol
/usr/include/stdio.h:165: error: previous declaration of 'FILE' was here

It appears "FILE" shows up in an enum in vfs_freebsd.c.
